research.title: MCP RCE Vulnerability Exposed 200K Servers — What the Anthropic 'Working as Designed' Response Means for Your Stack
research.whyTrending: Ox Security disclosure on April 15, 2026: STDIO transport allows arbitrary OS command execution before subprocess handshake. 200+ projects, 150M downloads, 7K+ public servers, 4 exploitation families incl. zero-click prompt injection in Cursor/Windsurf. Anthropic declined to patch — calls it 'expected behavior'. Banking sector flagged. Massive ongoing controversy.
